publishedAbstract: An osd prepare pod is stuck in init 0/2 with a failed map volume warning. ``` rook-ceph-osd-prepare-xxxxxxxxxxxx-xxxxx 0/1 Init:0/2 0 22h 2024-01-20T14:31:36Z 2024-01-19T16:10:42Z 660 rook-ceph-osd-prepare-xxxxxx-xxxx.xxxxxxxxx Pod Warning FailedMapVolume kubelet MapVolume.MapPodDevice failed for volume "pvc-xxxxxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxxxxxx": rpc error: code = AlreadyExists desc = block volume already mounted in more than one place ```
publishedTitle: OSD prepare pod stuck in init 0/2 with event rpc error: code = AlreadyExists
